category_sources: source_facts.description says it adjusts screen color temperature; official GitHub README describes Redshift adjusting color temperature according to surroundings.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is redshift; official GitHub README and About section use Redshift.
docs_sources: No separate official docs site was identified; official GitHub README contains usage, FAQ, and build documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/jonls/redshift; per instruction, repo was not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: Official GitHub About/topics include night-mode, eye-strain, color-temperature, gamma-ramps; source_facts identifies the redshift executable.
